profile.title: Profile
profile.unlockFeatures: Unlock all meditations, courses, and exclusive content

shcCoin.title: The Sacred Healing Coin
shcCoin.description1: The Sacred Healing Coin is more than a symbol—it is a gentle companion on the journey back to yourself. Infused with the vibrations of healing energy and spiritual intention, it serves as a reminder to slow down, breathe deeply, and reconnect with the inner wisdom that guides your life.
shcCoin.description2: Each coin carries the essence of freedom—freedom from old patterns, freedom to grow, and freedom to rise into the fullest version of who you are. Like healing music for the soul, its presence encourages balance, clarity, and renewal.
shcCoin.description3: Designed to inspire personal transformation, the Sacred Healing Coin also opens the path toward
shcCoin.description4: It represents alignment: when your energy is clear and your purpose awakened, abundance flows with greater ease.
shcCoin.symbolOfGrowth: A symbol of growth, a tool of empowerment, and a keeper of inner light.
shcCoin.phantomStep1: Download Phantom Wallet (mobile or browser extension)
shcCoin.phantomStep2: Create or import your wallet and add SOL (Solana)
shcCoin.phantomStep3: Open Phantom and tap the Swap icon
shcCoin.phantomStep4: Select SOL as the token you're swapping from
shcCoin.phantomStep5: Paste the SHC token address above or search "Sacred Healing Coin"
shcCoin.phantomStep6: Enter the amount and confirm the swap
shcCoin.cardStep1: Open Phantom Wallet and tap Buy
shcCoin.cardStep2: Select your preferred provider (MoonPay, Coinbase, etc.)
shcCoin.cardStep3: Enter your card details and amount to purchase SOL
shcCoin.cardStep4: Once SOL arrives, use the Swap feature
shcCoin.cardStep5: Swap your SOL for SHC using the token address above
shcCoin.cardTip: Tip: Phantom's built-in "Buy" feature lets you purchase crypto directly with your card—no external exchange needed!
